positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical, and stylized arrangement of tropical flora, featuring geometric line work, monstera leaves, hibiscus flowers, and fern fronds. The style must be a blend of modern botanical illustration and art deco geometry. Emphasize bold, clean silhouettes, negative space contrast, and a central, framed composition suitable for apparel printing. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of emerald green, deep sapphire blue, burnt orange, and cream. Composition must be contained within a perfect circle or central motif. Perfect for screen printing, vector graphic quality, clean lines, high resolution.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, deformed, mutated, extra limbs, bad anatomy, text, signature, watermark, logo, copyright, low quality, bokeh, noise, grayscale, photographic, realistic photo
